positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features graceful, glowing bioluminescent flora and oversized, abstract leaves creating intricate, overlapping silhouettes against a gradient sky of deep indigo, vibrant magenta, and soft gold. A majestic, stylized lunar moth with iridescent wings is positioned centrally, flying among the glowing plants. The composition must be highly symmetrical, utilizing negative space effectively to make the silhouettes pop. The art style should blend Art Nouveau curves with modern vector minimalism, emphasizing crisp lines and flat, graphic color blocking. Perfect for a centered, high-contrast apparel print, with a clean white border implied. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, photorealistic, low detail, messy, cluttered, text, watermark, logo, signature, harsh shadows, multiple figures, bad anatomy, extra limbs, abstract art, gradient noise
